# Pull Request

## What & why

<!-- Short description + linked issue -->

## Type

- [ ] feat - [ ] fix - [ ] docs - [ ] refactor - [ ] test - [ ] ci - [ ] sec - [ ] chore

## Checklist (root CLAUDE.md Definition of Done)

- [ ] Matches architecture & folder structure
- [ ] Validated inputs, typed, no `any`
- [ ] Tests added/updated, coverage gate green
- [ ] Logging + error handling present, no PII leaks
- [ ] Security checks (authn/authz/ownership) where applicable
- [ ] Docs / CLAUDE.md / ADR updated
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, security scans pass

## Roadmap phase

<!-- Which docs/roadmap.md phase does this advance? -->

## Reviews run

- [ ] Architecture Review (if structural)
- [ ] Security Review (if touches auth/data/permissions/secrets)
